title: No Weather
description: Makes it so that you can not see the annoying weather.
body:
## No Weather
No Weather makes it so that you can not see the weather.

## Important
You will still be able to hear the weather. If you don't want to hear the weather you can disable it in the Music & Sounds settings in the options menu.

## Extra
It is recommended to unzip the file so that in the Resource Packs Tab the name of the texture pack is No Weather instead of No Weather.zip You don't need to do this.
